summary: Post-merge closeout accepts the Core runtime task submission chain carrier after PR #249 merged with hosted governance checks passing.
reviewed_validation_summary: `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/core-runtime typecheck`; `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/api-server typecheck`; `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/core-runtime test`; `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/api-server test`; `pnpm typecheck`; `pnpm test`; `pnpm lint`; `git diff --check`; `jq empty .loom/bootstrap/init-result.json .loom/specs/CORE-244/build-evidence.json`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json`; `loom build --target . --item CORE-244 --build-evidence .loom/specs/CORE-244/build-evidence.json --json`; `loom resume --target . --item CORE-244 --json`; `loom suite validate/carrier/evidence --target . --item CORE-244 --json`; `loom pr gate 249 --target . --work-item CORE-244 --head-sha 9a6b23af428fcc98b78f35de77cd5f753b57e41a --json`; hosted run 28936264313 passed py-compile, demo-bootstrap, repo-local-cli, loom-check, and loom-pr-merge-gate; PR #249 merged to main as 9101eaa6f42cc6584e8b428de5398f0c1f56539d at 2026-07-08T10:39:22Z. Live Harbor/browser/site evidence was not attempted; this closeout proves the Core refs-only contract path, not App/Harbor live user usability.

reviewer_findings_consumed: P1 harbor.evidence_policy private material passthrough rejected at API boundary
P1 duplicate run_id race mapped to 409 instead of API 500
P2 Lode local resolver hardened with realpath root confinement including symlink escape coverage
consumed_inputs.pre_review_fallback_classification: loom pre-review blocked only on legacy deterministic tools/* commands that are absent from this repository checkout; suite validate/carrier/evidence, fact-chain, build, PR metadata preflight, full workspace typecheck/test/lint, and targeted self-checks passed.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The implementation uses a mock Harbor HTTP server for validation and does not claim live runtime evidence. It validates trust-boundary inputs, rejects private evidence policy fields, strips session/snapshot passthrough override surfaces, maps duplicate run races to 409, confines Lode file reads with realpath, and records only refs/public state in Core.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: After fixing the reviewer findings, targeted API/Core checks and full workspace typecheck/test/lint passed at the reviewed head.
